query: Kazuo Ueda BOJ Governor health status return schedule July 2026

{"query":"Kazuo Ueda BOJ Governor health status return schedule July 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1718,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-06-19/governor-ueda-has-been-discharged-from-hospital-boj-says","title":"BOJ Governor Ueda Discharged From Hospital, Set to Return Next Week - Bloomberg","content":"“For approximately the next two weeks, he is expected to continue carrying out his official duties while undergoing outpatient treatment.”"},{"url":"https://sg.finance.yahoo.com/news/boj-governor-ueda-resume-next-004401338.html","title":"BOJ governor Ueda to resume work next week after early discharge","content":"(June 19): Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda was discharged from the hospital Friday and plans to return to work on Tuesday, according to the BOJ.
He had been expected to stay in the hospital for two weeks.
"There had been some concern among market participants, so his discharge should provide a sense of reassurance," said Toru Suehiro, chief economist at Daiwa Securities."},{"url":"https://www.japantimes.co.jp/business/2026/06/19/boj-ueda-discharge-hospital/","title":"Gov. Ueda has been discharged from hospital, BOJ says - The Japan Times","content":"Ueda, 74, was hospitalized on June 9 for treatment of a liver cyst infection and didn’t attend a policy meeting earlier this week.
During Ueda’s absence, the policy board raised the benchmark interest rate to 1%, the highest since 1995."},{"url":"https://www.businesstimes.com.sg/companies-markets/banking-finance/bank-japan-governor-resume-work-next-week-after-early-discharge","title":"Bank of Japan governor to resume work next week after early discharge - The Business Times","content":"Kazuo Ueda is expected to attend the next policy meeting at the end of July, according to the central bank.
The governor missed the BOJ’s policy meeting on Tuesday, when the central bank raised interest rates to a 31-year high.
Deputy governor Ryozo Himino presided over the board at the Jun 15 to 16 meeting, while deputy Shinichi Uchida conducted the post-decision press briefing."},{"url":"https://mezha.net/eng/bukvy/27e568cc_boj_governor_is/","title":"BOJ governor is hospitalized, Ueda will miss June policy meeting | Ukraine news - #Mezha","content":"The governor’s sudden hospital stay raises questions about communication and market clarity as the BOJ approaches a possible historic interest rate decision.
TOKYO, June 10, 2026 – Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda was hospitalized for medical treatment and will miss the policy meeting on June 15–16, the central bank said on Wednesday.
Ueda, 74, will remain in the hospital for about two weeks for treatment of an infected liver cyst, will work remotely and will participate in the next meeting on July 30–31.
Deputy Governor Ryozo Himino will chair the policy review in Ueda’s stead, while another deputy governor, Shinichi Uchida, is scheduled to hold a post-meeting press conference, the BOJ said.
The announcement came after late May reports that Deputy Uchida had been discharged from the hospital after treatment for leukemia.
Ueda’s comments earlier this month emphasized the bank’s changed narrative, bringing market expectations closer to a possible rate hike as early as June.
At the same time, Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi expressed caution about plans to raise rates.
Some analysts suggest that Ueda’s health could give Sanae Takaichi an opportunity to influence BOJ policy, particularly regarding the appointment of a successor in the event of the governor’s resignation."}]}
